name: Bexio MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Bexio — the popular Swiss cloud-based ERP/accounting software for SMBs. Enables AI agents to manage contacts, create and send invoices, track accounting entries, manage projects, and handle CRM data in Bexio — supporting AI-driven business administration for Swiss and DACH market companies.
use_cases: Creating and managing invoices in Bexio from AI billing automation agents
Querying Bexio contacts and CRM data from customer management agents
Tracking accounting entries and financial data from financial analysis agents
Automating Bexio project management and time tracking via AI agents
not_for: Teams not using Bexio (QuickBooks, Xero, SAP users need different MCPs)
Non-Swiss/DACH businesses (Bexio is specifically designed for Switzerland market)
Large enterprise ERP needs (Bexio targets SMBs)
best_when: A Swiss SMB using Bexio for accounting and business management wants AI agents to automate invoicing, manage contacts, and process accounting entries.
avoid_when: You use QuickBooks, Xero, or other accounting platforms. Bexio is primarily for Swiss market with CHF currency and Swiss accounting standards.

auth.notes: Bexio OAuth 2.0. Requires Bexio developer account and app registration. OAuth scopes for contacts, accounting, invoicing, etc.

pricing.paid_tiers: Bexio: from CHF 29/month for basic plan
pricing.notes: Bexio is a paid Swiss SaaS. MCP server is free open source (promptpartner community implementation).

performance.rate_limits: Bexio API rate limits apply — 100 requests/minute typically

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Invoicing and accounting operations affect real business finances — review before sending
Bexio targets Swiss market — CHF currency and Swiss accounting standards (OR, MWST)
OAuth scopes must match operations — invoice creation needs different scope than contact reading
Community MCP implementation (promptpartner) — may not cover all Bexio API endpoints
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Business financial data and invoicing. OAuth 2.0 with scopes. GDPR/Swiss data protection. Financial data is highly sensitive.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial data. Swiss/EU data residency. GDPR. OAuth 2.0 with granular scopes.
